args.subject: Your pro-rata Halcyon refund
args.body: A pro-rata refund of 240.00 has been issued to order ORD-3320 following the end of your Halcyon contract.

args.text: Refund of 240.00 issued against ORD-3320 and customer notified.

args.subject: Fernwood Ltd: deletion schedule confirmed
args.body: Deletion schedule for Fernwood Ltd exports is confirmed: deletion on 2026-06-13, 30 days after export preparation.

args.subject: Fernwood Ltd offboarding complete
args.body: Fernwood Ltd's Halcyon offboarding is complete: access revoked, export manifest prepared, pro-rata refund issued, and deletion scheduled.
